CSS Visual Order Differs from DOM Order Test Page

These elements use inline style="order: N" (non-zero) to resequence their visual order away from their DOM order. This can cause reading order confusion for screen reader users.

Flex Items Reordered via inline order property

DOM first, visual last (order: 3)
DOM second, visual first (order: 1)
DOM third, visual middle (order: 2)

Reverse-direction flex container

Child A (DOM first, visual last)
Child B (DOM middle)
Child C (DOM last, visual first)

Back to index
